MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES (VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE):
Atty. PARVIZ DARABI, Esq. of Law Offices of Parviz Darabi (Tel: 650-343-5357) for plaintiff Juan Escobar;
Atty. SERENA J. KALLAS, Esq. of Kallas Legal, APC (Tel: 408-275-2522) for defendants Ministry of Taste and Fisher Baker and Farmer, LLC.

HEARING RE: PLAINTIFF JUAN ESCOBAR's Motion To Compel All Defendants To Provide Responses To Discovery Requests; For An Order That All Objections Are Deemed Waived; And For An Award Of Monetary Sanctions Against All Defendants And Attorney.

Parties stipulate to the matter being decided by the Judge Pro Tem. The Judge Pro Tem and the parties authorize the clerk to sign the formal stipulation form on their behalf.

Matter argued.

The parties reach a settlement as to the motion and will email a proposed stipulated order to the Judge Pro Tem at rkane1089@aol.com.

Judge Pro Tem: Robert Kane; Clerk: Sean Kane; Not Reported. (302/JPT)
